title: Nutella Marinated Olive Tapenade
description: A unique Spanish dish featuring Nutella marinated with whole olives for a solo dinner option that's also Whole30-friendly.

ingredients.name: Olive Tapenade
ingredients.notes: Prepared as per standard olive tapenade recipe

ingredients.name: Olives
ingredients.notes: Use Kalamata or green olives for a sweeter marination

instructions: Combine Nutella with olive tapenade in a bowl.
Add the halved and pitted olives to the mixture.
Mix well until olives are fully coated and evenly distributed in the Nutella mixture.
Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
